creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Fun and unconventional date ideas to try this LOVE month!

❤️ Horseback Riding
* Spots we love for horse rides: Mleiha, Hatta, and Pearl Jumeirah Beach. Featured in this reel is the beach ride organized by A3yan Stables.

❤️ Clear Kayaking
* Aqua Tech Double Clear Kayak: 79 AED per person/hour 

❤️ Skyviews Edge Walk
* 499 AED per person

❤️ Dinner in the Sky
* Packages at 599 AED per person onwards 

❤️ Hot Air Balloon
* Check out current offers at Balloon Flights and Rayna Tours

❤️ Eco-luxury Desert Safari
* Different packages are available at Platinum Heritage.

❤️ Desert Glamping
* There are several glamping venues in the UAE. We highly recommend Mysk Al Badayer in Sharjah. Rate depends on the room type and season. 

Tag your date!

transcription.text: I know you've been Hanging in there Hanging in there Baby Baby Hanging in there You don't
